features: Our 100ml Reed Diffusers make a statement. They are packed full of delightful fragrance that is long-lasting, strong with a perfect scent throw into your room
Place in the kitchen, bathroom, living or anywhere in the home
The thick reeds soak up the fragrance oil and disperse the scent into your home
description: Product Description Our 100ml Airpure Reed Diffusers make a statement. They are packed full of delightful fragrance that is long-lasting, strong with a perfect scent throw into your room. The thick reeds soak up the fragrance oil and disperse the scent into your home and being black they look so stylish and sleek - this Reed Diffuser isn't just about the amazing fragrance, you can display this is any room in your home and know it will look super stylish and on trend. We are certain that you will fall in love with these diffusers, and by popular demand you can now enjoy our new Lime, Basil & Mandarin fragrance, it's causing quite a stir! Ingredients Lime, Basil Directions Place the reeds into the oil and then into the bottle to disperse the scent into the home. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Use in a well-ventilated area. See more
